homunculus_brew.title: Brew the Homunculus — the PTD brewing chain that processes the 999 accumulated souls into the Stone precursor

transmutation.title: Use the Philosopher's Stone for its first transmutation — convert a material using divine alchemy

subtitle.text: After the souls come the Homunculus. After the Homunculus comes the Stone. After the Stone: transmutation.

description: CH.16 · THE HOMUNCULUS CHAIN
▸ After 999 souls are accumulated,
the Homunculus brew converts them into the Stone precursor.
The Homunculus is the intermediate step — not the Stone itself.
The chain: Mass Accumulate → Homunculus → Philosopher's Stone.
Three steps. One direction. No return.
◈ THE HOMUNCULUS BREW
└ Source: divine: mod brewing mechanic
Check JEI: divine:homunculus or similar
└ Requires: accumulated souls (999) + specific alchemical ingredients
(likely: Gold, Soul Sand, Nether materials — check JEI)
└ Output: divine:homunculus or intermediate alchemical item
└ Process: brew in a specialized vessel (check PTD mod guide)
The brew takes time — not instant crafting
◈ PHILOSOPHER'S STONE
└ Crafted from: Homunculus + specific materials → Stone
(check JEI: divine:philosophers_stone)
└ Use: stone held in inventory or placed in crafting grid
enables divine transmutation recipes
└ Transmutation: convert materials at a ratio
(stone → iron, iron → gold, coal → diamond — verify in JEI)
└ The Stone does not run out (or has limited uses — check mod)
◈ TRANSMUTATION APPLICATIONS
└ Resource conversion: low-value materials → high-value
└ Ch17 prep: transmute surplus into any Ch17 crafting materials
that are hard to source in bulk
└ Create Teleporters: Quantum Fluid is Chorus + Water
(transmutation does not affect quantum recipes — those are fixed)
└ The Stone is a backup supply chain for anything scarce
▸ Hohenheim carried the stones of the Xerxians for 400 years.
Every step he took, they spoke to him.
He used them in the end to counter something worse.
Your stone was made from a deliberate choice.
Whether the choice was the same as Hohenheim's
or different from it
determines what the stone says to you.
It is made now.
Make use of it.
▶ Brew the Homunculus [check]
▶ Use the Philosopher's Stone for first transmutation [check]
◇ If you are at this quest, you chose the Stone path.
The cost is already paid.
The only question now is whether the Stone pays off in Ch17.
It does — specific divine: recipes in Ch17 require the Stone.
The path is complete.
